cassette: none: reducer.PostgresAWSCloudRuntimeDriftWriter is a Postgres fact writer, not a Cypher graph writer, and operates over flat model.Candidate values, not a CanonicalMaterialization; the two fixture candidates live inline in go/internal/replay/costcounting/aws_cloud_runtime_drift_cost_test.go
description: Two admitted aws_cloud_runtime_drift candidates (orphaned + unmanaged cloud resource) in one scope, driven through the production Postgres fact writer over an InstrumentedDB-wrapped counting queryer. WriteAWSCloudRuntimeDriftFindings now calls the shared reducerBatchInsertVersionedFacts bounded chunked bulk insert (go/internal/reducer/reducer_fact_batch_insert.go, batch size 1000, issue #5317) instead of one ExecContext per candidate: two rows fit one chunk, so eshu_dp_postgres_query_duration_seconds records exactly 1 observation and statements_executed=1. Two negative controls guard this: a duplicate-invocation control (same candidate set written twice) and a within-call N+1 control (one candidate per Write call) both exceed this tightened budget.
refresh_path: manual: edit the inline fixture candidates in aws_cloud_runtime_drift_cost_test.go and this file together, reviewed in the same diff (no credentialed cassette refresh applies since there is no cassette)
